records.question: Who are the players that died in Kalamazoo, MI?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN player_college ON player.player_id = player_college.player_id
JOIN college ON player_college.college_id = college.college_id
WHERE player.death_city = 'Kalamazoo' AND player.death_state = 'MI'
records.pred_sql: select player_id from player where lower(death_city) like '%kalamazoo%' and lower(death_state) like '%mi%' limit 5;
records.thought: To find players who died in Kalamazoo, MI, filter the player table by death_city and death_state with case-insensitive matching.

records.question: Which players named Pete who debuted on 1936-06-13 have a height of exactly 75?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
WHERE player.height = 75 AND player.name_first = 'Pete' AND player.debut = '1936-06-13'
records.pred_sql: select player.player_id from player where lower(name_first) like '%pete%' and debut = '1936-06-13' and height = 75 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter players by first name 'Pete' (case insensitive), debut date '1936-06-13', and height exactly 75, then select their player_id with a limit of 5.

records.question: Who are the players that weigh exactly 182 and were born in CAN?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
WHERE player.weight = 182 AND player.birth_country = 'CAN'
records.pred_sql: select player_id from player where weight = 182 and lower(birth_country) like '%can%' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter players by weight exactly 182 and birth_country as 'can' (case insensitive).

records.question: Which players born in Penacook, NH who bat left-handed, are at most 71 inches tall, have a birth day of 17, died in 1969, and were All-Stars in 1939 or later with a manager award?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
WHERE all_star.year >= 1939 AND player.birth_state = 'NH' AND player.bats = 'L' AND player.height <= 71 AND player.birth_day = 17 AND player.death_year = 1969 AND player.birth_city = 'Penacook'
records.pred_sql:
select player.player_id
from player
join all_star on player.player_id = all_star.player_id
join manager_award on player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
where lower(player.birth_city) like '%penacook%'
  and lower(player.birth_state) like '%nh%'
  and lower(player.bats) like '%l%'
  and player.height <= 71
  and player.birth_day = 17
  and player.death_year = 1969
  and all_star.year >= 1939
limit 5
records.thought: Filter players by birth city, state, batting hand, height, birth day, and death year, then join with all_star for years 1939 or later and manager_award to find those with a manager award.

records.question: Which players named Baker, born in the USA and California, who throw right-handed, weigh at least 183 pounds, and were born in month 6 or later have won a manager award?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
WHERE player.birth_month >= 6 AND player.weight >= 183 AND player.birth_state = 'CA' AND player.throws = 'R' AND player.birth_country = 'USA' AND player.name_last = 'Baker'
records.pred_sql: select player.player_id from player join manager_award on player.player_id = manager_award.player_id where lower(player.name_last) like '%baker%' and lower(player.birth_country) like '%usa%' and lower(player.birth_state) like '%california%' and player.throws = 'R' and player.weight >= 183 and player.birth_month >= 6 limit 5
records.thought: Filter players with last name like 'baker', born in USA and California, throwing right-handed, weighing at least 183 pounds, and born in month 6 or later, then join with manager_award to find those who have won a manager award.

records.question: Which players who throw right-handed participated in at least 0 games as all-stars with exactly 1 game played and received a manager award in 1989?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
WHERE all_star.gp = 1 AND player.throws = 'R' AND all_star.game_num >= 0 AND manager_award.year = 1989
records.pred_sql:
select player.player_id
from player
join all_star on player.player_id = all_star.player_id
join manager_award on player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
where player.throws = 'r'
  and all_star.year = 1989
  and all_star.gp = 1
  and manager_award.year = 1989
limit 5;
records.thought: Filter players who throw right-handed, participated in exactly 1 all-star game in 1989, and received a manager award in 1989, then select their player_id.

SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id

records.pred_sql: select player.player_id from player join all_star on player.player_id = all_star.player_id where lower(player.name_last) like '%sabathia%' and lower(player.birth_state) like '%california%' limit 5;

records.question: Which players named Terry Francona, who debuted on or before 1981-08-19 and played their final game exactly on 1990-04-19, have received a manager award?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
WHERE player.final_game = '1990-04-19' AND player.name_first = 'Terry' AND player.name_last = 'Francona' AND player.debut <= '1981-08-19'
records.pred_sql: select player.player_id from player join manager_award on player.player_id = manager_award.player_id where lower(player.name_first) like '%terry%' and lower(player.name_last) like '%francona%' and player.debut <= '1981-08-19' and player.final_game = '1990-04-19' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter players named Terry Francona with debut on or before 1981-08-19 and final game exactly 1990-04-19, then check if they have any manager awards.

records.question: What players who debuted on or after 1965-04-13 and are at least 73 inches tall have been selected as all-stars and also received a manager award?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
WHERE player.debut >= '1965-04-13' AND player.height >= 73
records.pred_sql:
select player.player_id
from player
join all_star on player.player_id = all_star.player_id
join manager_award on player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
where player.debut >= '1965-04-13'
  and player.height >= 73
limit 5;
records.thought: Filter players who debuted on or after 1965-04-13 and are at least 73 inches tall, then find those who have been selected as all-stars and have received a manager award by joining the relevant tables.

records.question: Which players named Gerald Arthur, born in Sacramento, CA, USA in August, who bat left-handed, weigh at most 185 pounds, and played their final game on or after July 8, 1993?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
WHERE player.final_game >= '1993-07-08' AND player.name_given = 'Gerald Arthur' AND player.birth_state = 'CA' AND player.birth_city = 'Sacramento' AND player.birth_country = 'USA' AND player.bats = 'L' AND player.birth_month = 8 AND player.weight <= 185
records.pred_sql: select player.player_id from player where lower(name_first) like '%gerald%' and lower(name_last) like '%arthur%' and lower(birth_city) like '%sacramento%' and lower(birth_state) like '%ca%' and lower(birth_country) like '%usa%' and birth_month = 8 and lower(bats) like '%l%' and weight <= 185 and final_game >= '1993-07-08' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter players by first and last name, birth city, state, country, birth month, batting side, weight, and final game date to find those matching the criteria.
